title: Create FD Mesh
description: Create a finite difference mesh with given dimensions
code: mesh = FDMesh(; nx=${nx}, ny=${ny}, nz=${nz}, dx=${dx}e-9, dy=${dy}e-9, dz=${dz}e-9)

title: Create FD Mesh with PBC
description: Create a mesh with periodic boundary conditions
code: mesh = FDMesh(; nx=${nx}, ny=${ny}, nz=${nz}, dx=${dx}e-9, dy=${dy}e-9, dz=${dz}e-9, pbc="${pbc}")

title: Create Simulation (SD)
description: Create simulation with steepest descent driver for energy minimization

title: Create Simulation (LLG)
description: Create simulation with LLG driver and DormandPrince integrator

title: Set Constant Ms
description: Set uniform saturation magnetization (A/m)

title: Set Ms within Shape
description: Set saturation magnetization inside a geometric shape (only the cells within the shape will have non-zero Ms)

title: Set Ms by Region Map
description: Set Ms values for different regions using region_map

title: Init Magnetization (Constant)
description: Set initial magnetization to a uniform direction

title: Set Ms (Spatial Function)
description: Define a spatially varying saturation magnetization using a coordinate function
code:
function circular_Ms(x, y, z)
    if x^2 + y^2 <= (${radius}e-9)^2
        return ${Ms}
    end
    return 0.0
end
set_Ms(sim, circular_Ms)

title: Init Vortex
description: Initialize a magnetic vortex with given polarity and chirality

title: Init Skyrmion
description: Initialize a magnetic skyrmion

title: Init Bubble
description: Initialize a magnetic bubble domain

title: Init Spatial m0 (Grid Function)
description: Initialize magnetization using a grid-based (i,j,k) function

title: Init Spatial m0 (Coordinate Function)
description: Initialize magnetization using a spatial (x,y,z) function

title: Add Exchange Interaction
description: Add isotropic exchange interaction with constant A (J/m)

title: Add Demagnetization
description: Add demagnetization (dipole-dipole) field calculation using FFT

title: Add Demagnetization with Macro BC
description: Add demagnetization with macro boundary conditions (Nx, Ny, Nz repetitions)

title: Add Static Zeeman
description: Add uniform static external magnetic field (A/m)

title: Add Time-Varying Zeeman
description: Add time-dependent external magnetic field H0 * f(t)

title: Add Uniaxial Anisotropy
description: Add uniaxial magnetocrystalline anisotropy

title: Add Cubic Anisotropy
description: Add cubic magnetocrystalline anisotropy

title: Add Hexagonal Anisotropy
description: Add hexagonal anisotropy (K1, K2, K3)

title: Add Bulk DMI
description: Add bulk Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction

title: Add Interfacial DMI
description: Add interfacial DMI (spatially varying D)

title: Add Interlayer DMI
description: Add interlayer DMI between two layers k1 and k2

title: Add Interlayer Exchange (RKKY)
description: Add RKKY-type interlayer exchange coupling between layers

title: Add Spin-Orbit Torque (SOT)
description: Add damping-like and field-like spin-orbit torque

title: Add Spin Transfer Torque (Zhang-Li)
description: Add Zhang-Li spin transfer torque for in-plane currents
code: add_stt(sim, model=:zhang_li, P=${P}, Ms=${Ms}, xi=${xi}, J=(${Jx}, ${Jy}, ${Jz}))

title: Add Spin Transfer Torque (Slonczewski)
description: Add Slonczewski STT for perpendicular current in MTJs
code: add_stt(sim, model=:slonczewski, J=${J}, tf=${tf}, Ms=${Ms}, p=(${px}, ${py}, ${pz}), P=${P}, Lambda=${Lambda})

title: Add SAHE Torque
description: Add spin anomalous Hall effect torque

title: Add Custom Torque
description: Add a user-defined torque function T(m, t) to the LLG equation
code:
function custom_torque(y, m, t)
    y .= 0
    y[1:3:end] .= ${amp} .* sin(${omega} .* t)
end
add_torque(sim, custom_torque)

title: Add Thermal Noise
description: Add stochastic thermal noise at temperature T (K)

title: Add Pulsed Thermal Noise
description: Add thermal noise with time-dependent scaling

title: Set Region by Index
description: Assign region ID to specific grid indices

title: Set Region by Shape
description: Assign region ID to cells within a geometric shape

title: Create Voronoi Grains
description: Generate Voronoi tessellation for polycrystalline microstructures
code:
grain_ids, gb_mask, seeds = voronoi(mesh; min_dist=${min_dist}, seed=${seed}, threshold=${threshold})
function spatial_Ms(i,j,k,dx,dy,dz)
    if gb_mask[i,j,k]
        return 0
    end
    return ${Ms}
end
set_Ms(sim, spatial_Ms)

title: Create Sphere Shape
description: Create a sphere with center and radius for CSG operations

title: Create Box Shape
description: Create a box with center and size for CSG operations

title: Create Cylinder Shape
description: Create a cylinder for CSG operations

title: Set Driver (LLG)
description: Change simulation driver to LLG with specific parameters

title: Set Driver (Inertial LLG)
description: Change to inertial Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert driver

title: Set Driver (Spatial LLG)
description: Change to spatial LLG driver with position-dependent alpha

title: Relax Simulation
description: Relax the system to equilibrium using SD driver

title: Run Dynamic Simulation (Steps)
description: Run LLG dynamics for a specified number of steps

title: Save OVF to Movie
description: Generate a movie (.gif) from saved OVF data

title: Set Float Precision (Float64)
description: Set simulation to use Float64 (double precision)

title: Set Float Precision (Float32)
description: Set simulation to use Float32 (single precision, faster on GPU)

title: Set Backend to CUDA
description: Switch compute backend to NVIDIA CUDA GPU

title: Set Backend to CPU
description: Switch compute backend to CPU

title: Set Backend to AMD GPU
description: Switch compute backend to AMD GPU

title: Set Backend to Metal
description: Switch compute backend to Apple Metal GPU

title: Set mu_s (Atomistic)
description: Set magnetic moment per site for atomistic simulations

title: Set mu_s (with mu_B)
description: Set magnetic moment using Bohr magneton

title: Add Interfacial DMI (scalar)
description: Add interfacial DMI with scalar constant

title: Add Bulk DMI (scalar)
description: Add bulk DMI with scalar constant

title: Create CubicMesh
description: Create atomistic cubic mesh

title: Create TriangularMesh
description: Create triangular lattice mesh for 2D atomistic simulations

title: Init m0 Random
description: Initialize spins with random directions

title: Save OVF File
description: Save magnetization to OVF format file

title: Save VTK File
description: Save magnetization to VTK format file

title: Read OVF File
description: Read magnetization from OVF file

title: Read Simulation Data
description: Read saved simulation data table

title: Compute Energy
description: Compute system energy after simulation

title: Compute Skyrmion Number
description: Compute skyrmion number from simulation

title: Compute Guiding Center
description: Compute vortex/skyrmion guiding center position

title: Create Cylinder with Height
description: Create a finite-height cylinder

title: Create Torus
description: Create a torus shape

title: Create Plane
description: Create an infinite plane

title: Run Until Time
description: Run simulation until specified time

title: Run Hysteresis Loop
description: Compute hysteresis loop with field sweep
code:
Hs = [i * mT for i in ${H_min}:${step}:${H_max}]
hysteresis(sim, Hs; direction=(${dx}, ${dy}, ${dz}), stopping_dmdt=${stopping_dmdt}, full_loop=${full_loop})

title: Init Skyrmion Lattice
description: Initialize skyrmion lattice

title: Init Hopfion
description: Initialize 3D hopfion
